execution_header.scope: Apply GitHub metadata hygiene for active repos only, then write V2 evidence into Uniton_Shared.

archive_repo.warning: HTTP 403: Repository was archived so is read-only.

in_scope_actions: Read active LAW_GITHUB_01, LAW_N5, REPO_REGISTRY, and GITHUB_METADATA_HYGIENE_PLAN_V1.
Captured pre-apply GitHub descriptions/topics and branch-protection read state.
Created V2 evidence artifacts in Uniton_Shared.
out_of_scope_avoided: No code edits in product or runtime repositories.
No repo rename, delete, archive, or unarchive.

capability_check.action: Apply scoped GitHub metadata descriptions/topics and create V2 evidence.
capability_check.side_effect_class: GitHub metadata settings update plus Uniton_Shared evidence commit.
capability_check.capability_source: Active LAW_GITHUB_01, LAW_N5 REPORT_TEMPLATE_V2, REPO_REGISTRY, and NTS task authorization.
capability_check.authorization: NTS scoped metadata hygiene apply task.

repo_boundary_check.notes: No repository code/files were changed outside Uniton_Shared. Only authorized GitHub description/topic metadata was changed on target repos.

validation: Preflight workspace, remote, branch, git status, and gh auth passed.
Post-apply gh repo view confirmed descriptions/topics for six active/non-archived repos.
Post-apply gh repo view confirmed _archive_chatbot remains archived and has archive/not-active topics.
Branch protection read state matched before and after.
No branch protection, CI, PR, code, deploy, secret, archive-state, delete, or rename changes were made.
risks_warnings: _archive_chatbot description update blocked by GitHub archived read-only state; repository remained archived and not active.
Branch protection planning/apply remains a future task.
README orientation, CI hardening, PR backlog review, and uzgplus-app secret review remain future tasks.
